name: Starry Knight Sky
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>煌めく聖夜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ホーリーナイツ・スカイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During your Main Phase, you can Normal Summon 1 "Starry Knight" monster, or 1 Level 7 LIGHT Dragon monster, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) During your turn, if a face-up Level 7 LIGHT Dragon monster you control returns to the hand: You can draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Starry Knight Sky" once per turn.
eff: During your Main Phase, you can Normal Summon 1 "Starry Knight" monster, or 1 Level 7 LIGHT Dragon monster, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) During your turn, if a face-up Level 7 LIGHT Dragon monster you control returns to the hand: You can draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Starry Knight Sky" once per turn.

action: Activates if returned from the field to the hand
misc: Gain this effect once per turn
